sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C for Questions 11-14. Choose TWO letters A-E for Questions 15 and 16. Choose FOUR answers from below for Questions 17-20.

questions.content: According to the manager what do most people like about the job of kitchen assistant?
The manager is concerned about some of the new staff’s
The manager says that the day is likely to be busy for kitchen staff because
options: A. it is a public holiday
B. the head chef is absent
C. the restaurant is almost fully booked

questions.content: Only kitchen staff who are 18 or older are allowed to use
According to the manager which TWO things can make the job of kitchen assistant stressful?
options: A. they have to follow orders immediately.
B. the kitchen gets very hot
C. they may not be able to take a break
D. they have to do overtime
E. the work is physically demanding

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C for Questions 21-23. Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer for Questions 24-30.

questions.content: What will be the main topic of Trudie and Stewart’s paper?
options: A. how public library services are organized in different countries
B. how changes in society are reflected in public libraries
C. how the funding of public libraries has changed

questions.content: They agree that one disadvantage of free digitalized books is that
options: A. they may take a long time to read
B. they can be difficult to read

questions.content: Stewart expects that in the future libraries will
options: B. become centres for local communities
C. no longer contain any books

questions.content:
Study of local library: possible questions
• Whether it has a {{BLANK}} of its own
• Its policy regarding noise of various kinds
• How it’s affected by laws regarding all aspects of {{BLANK}}
• How the design needs to take the {{BLANK}} of customers into account
• What {{BLANK}} is required in case of accidents
• Why a famous person’s {{BLANK}} is located in the library
• Whether it has a {{BLANK}} of local organisations
• How it’s different from a library in a {{BLANK}}
